items.title: New law puts Kansas at vanguard of denying trans identities on drivers licenses, birth certificates
items.description: Kansas is set to invalidate about 1,700 driver's licenses held by transgender residents and roughly as many of their birth certificates

items.title: Danish military evacuates US submariner who needed urgent medical care off Greenland
items.description: Denmark’s military says its arctic command forces evacuated a crew member of a U.S. submarine off the coast of Greenland for urgent medical treatment

items.title: It's on: US and Canada face off for Olympic gold in men's hockey as Winter Games come to a close
items.description: The U.S. and Canada meet in the men's gold-medal hockey game at the Winter Olympics after each went 5-0 to advance

items.title: A policy wonk who wants Nancy Pelosi's House seat is unafraid of a fight
items.description: The state lawmaker favored to succeed Nancy Pelosi in the House is no stranger to the national spotlight

items.title: Blizzard warnings send East Coast scrambling to prepare for heavy snow and strong winds
items.description: Emergency officials in New York City, New Jersey, Boston and communities along the East Coast are rushing to prepare for an intense winter storm, fore...
